title: Po_core semantic_jump_plan v1
description: PR-014 design + runtime contract (seed-level). Produced from a semantic_jump_tensor_v1 whose jump_recommended is true. A semantic_jump_plan PROPOSES that a semantic frame change be reviewed -- it never performs the jump, never rewrites content, and always requires human review. See docs/contracts/SEMANTIC_JUMP_TENSOR_CONTRACT_V1.md.

semantic_jump_tensor_id.description: The semantic_jump_tensor that recommended this plan.

decision_id.description: Optional: the po_self_decision this plan is contextually associated with, if any.

source_jump_type.description: Mirrors the source tensor's jump_type at plan time. 'none' is excluded here because a plan is only created when jump_recommended was true.

requires_human_review.description: A semantic_jump_plan always requires human review before any future execution phase could act on it -- a gate, not a deleted concept (docs/STRICT_CORE_RULES.md Safety Floor / Concept Ceiling).
